{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Card Infobox|Bash||2}}{{Power Infobox|Vulnerable|2}}
{{C|Bash||2}} is a 2 {{Icon|IE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic&color:Ironclad|Basic|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack&color:Ironclad|Attack|2}} Card for the {{KW|Ironclad||2}}.

== Obtaining Bash ==
The {{KW|Ironclad||2}} starts the game with one copy of {{C|Bash||2}} in his deck. It is not found in card rewards.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
*{{BD|Vulnerable||2}} applied by this card:
** Increases damage dealt by {{C|Bully||2}}.
** Grants an additional hit from {{C|Dismantle||2}}.
** Grants additional {{BD|Strength||2}} from {{C|Dominate||2}}.
** Draws 1 (2) card via {{C|Vicious||2}}.
** Makes enemies deal 50% less damage with {{C|Colossus||2}}.
** Makes enemies take 25% (50%) more damage with {{C|Cruelty||2}}.
** Makes enemies take 25% more damage with {{R|Paper Phrog||2}}.
** Is potentially doubled by {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}}.
====Relics====
* {{R|Intimidating Helmet||2}} grants 4 {{KW|Block||2}} whenever this card is played.
== Notes ==
{{R|Archaic Tooth||2}}, if taken from {{KW|Orobas||2}}, transforms {{C|Bash||2}} into its {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} version {{C|Break||2}}.
*If {{C|Bash||2}} has already been upgraded and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}, {{C|Break||2}} will be upgraded and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}} by default.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Bash to the game.
